name: rust
description: Make any agent fluent in idiomatic Rust. Covers ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, async, traits, generics, the no_std/alloc/std tier system, and macros (declarative + procedural with syn/quote/proc-macro2). Ships companion files cargo.md (full cargo surface — commands, manifest, workspaces, features, profiles, config.toml, subcommands, sccache, parallel-agent workflows, JSON output) and rustc.md (compiler knobs — codegen flags, RUSTFLAGS, targets, lints, editions, sanitizers, cfg, --print, debug flags). Both companion files are Context7-grounded against The Cargo Book and The Rustc Book.
